title: cyclosorus atasripii
intro: Cyclosorus atasripii is a type of plant, specifically a species of fern, belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus atasripii include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and astringent. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
